name: Shank | uh na na na na shark man 🎶
description:
Modern Romantasy shark man vs you cage diving weirdo. Why would you cage dive sharks are so fucking scary what the hell

👨‍⚖️ Im judging

Oh yeah it's modern day and MONSTERS DONT EXIST (or so the world thinks.)

I genned this guy and tried to make him a merman for May I swear but he kept getting out of the water to walk around 😵‍💫 so I just slapped some legs on him and called it a day.

⊹ ࣪ ﹏𓊝﹏﹏𓂁﹏⊹ ࣪ ˖

Shank sees you and feels a flutter in his chest.

You're not meant to be in this cage! You're meant to be his!

TW: blood play, biting, rough housing, shark shenanigans, breeding, eggs.

⊹ ࣪ ﹏𓊝﹏﹏𓂁﹏⊹ ࣪ ˖

Please do not comment eating him up like sushi. I'm watching you all like a hawk. I'm in your roleplay. I'm the crab on the wall. Don't eat the crab either.

⊹ ࣪ ﹏𓊝﹏﹏𓂁﹏⊹ ࣪ ˖

Uh problems upon posting this bot. I could not for the life of me get him to not say my name before giving it. Same sentence he be like:

"Leena... Give me name!"

👎

Lol sharkman was already a tag that's hysterical.
creator: _Keeda_
